title: Castile car-wash concentrate
subtitle: A plant-based washing concentrate for cars and outdoor furniture
excerpt: Castile soap cuts through road grime, bird droppings, and traffic film without stripping wax. Add to a bucket of warm water for a quick foaming wash that rinses clean. Vegetable glycerine adds a light protective shine.
sourceNotes: Surfactant action of plant-based soap on vehicle finishes: standard automotive cleaning chemistry. Glycerine as a surface conditioner: cosmetic and cleaning formulation reference.

recipe.makeAheadNotes: Mix directly in a bucket just before washing. Do not store as a pre-mixed batch -- the diluted soap loses its foaming action after a few hours.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: Mix fresh for each wash and discard leftover bucket water.

glossaryTerms.definition: A plant-derived humectant. At low concentrations in cleaning products it leaves a thin film that helps water sheet off surfaces, reducing spotting on paintwork.

content.text: Castile soap removes road grime without stripping car wax. A small amount of
helps water run off when rinsing, which reduces water spots. The sweet orange essential oil adds scent only -- leave it out for an unscented wash.

Fill a bucket with 8 to 10 litres of warm water. Add 4 tablespoons of castile soap, 1 teaspoon of vegetable glycerine, and the essential oil if using. Swirl to combine -- do not stir vigorously or the soap will foam up in the bucket before you start. The solution should be lightly sudsy.

Rinse the car with plain water first to loosen loose grit and prevent scratching. Then wash panel by panel with a sponge or wash mitt dipped in the soapy water, working from the roof down. Rinse the sponge frequently. Hose or rinse off with clean water from the top down. Dry with a chamois leather or microfibre cloth to prevent water spots.

Also works for garden furniture, bicycles, and plastic outdoor play equipment. Not recommended for matte paint finishes, which need dedicated non-sudsing products. This formula does not contain a wax or sealant -- if the car needs its wax refreshed, use a dedicated car wax after washing.
